{{Quote|More people we owed money to.|[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], to [[Voren Na'al/Legends|Voren Na'al]], regarding [[Vinda (shipwright)|Vinda]] and D'rag|<ref name="Han Solo and the Corporate Sector Sourcebook">''[[Han Solo and the Corporate Sector Sourcebook]]''</ref>}}
'''D'rag''' was a [[starshipwright]] and the co-owner of [[Starshipwrights and Aerospace Engineers Incorporated]] along with their partner [[Vinda (shipwright)|Vinda]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Oslumpex V/Legends|Oslumpex V]]. In [[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]], [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] owed them 2,500 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] for their work on his [[Starship/Legends|starship]], the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']]. Taking advantage of this knowledge, the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]] executive [[Odumin]]—posing as a [[Skip tracer/Legends|skip tracer]] called "Spray," looking to repossess the vessel for D'rag and Vinda—got close to Solo and his [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] partner [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] in his investigation of a [[Slavery/Legends|slaving]] ring in the [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]].<ref name="hsr" />

==Behind the scenes==
D'rag was first mentioned in ''[[Han Solo's Revenge]]'', a novel written by [[Brian Daley]] and released in [[1979]].<ref name="hsr" />
